Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}By the way, Officer Kurosawa can't experience the Dark Hour; he's just an ordinary policeman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But he knows what we do—at least in a broad sense—and helps out where he can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3035 0 0}Well, I don't know how he knows about our situation, but regardless...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}He seems to be simply following his own convictions and doing what he thinks is right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}He's a good man. You should be glad to have him on our side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3063 0 0}Well... He helped me out a while ago.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Trust me, he's someone you can count on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}You can rely on Officer Kurosawa to provide good equipment. Just remember to get it from him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3009 0 0}The doctor told me to rest, but I don't want to risk losing my edge.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I was thinking that getting back into training could be a good way to rehabilitate, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If Mitsuru finds out, being told to rest will be the least of my worries.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}*sigh* I wish I could at least get back to training for the boxing team after school...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, speaking of after-school activities, I heard you joined a club.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3096 0 0}You better give it your best, all right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}It might be hard to participate regularly, but it'll be worth it if you can find the time for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}*sigh* I wish I could at least get back to training for the boxing team after school...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, speaking of after-school activities, have you thought about joining any clubs?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3062 0 0}A lot of clubs won't accept new members partway through your second year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I recommend looking for any ones that do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3092 0 0}They say it'll still be some time before my injuries fully heal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}*sigh* Well, I hope I can get back to fighting sooner rather than later. Guess we'll see...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3113 0 0}Well, what're you standing around here for? Go have some fun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I can't do much with my injury, but I don't have anything in particular to take care of anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3136 0 0}Hey, don't worry about me. Go spend your time however you want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3078 0 0}So, I heard Mitsuru asked you to join student council.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry if it feels like you're being forced to, but I'm sure she could really use your help.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, anyway, it's ultimately up to you, so give it some thought.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3106 0 0}Tons of people all playing the same game together...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}And it's online, right? I imagine that makes it even harder to know who you're playing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess not knowing your enemies makes it easier, in some respects.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3080 0 0}As for me, I prefer to look my opponent straight in the face before we compete.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}In both boxing and actual combat, speed is key.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whether you're landing an attack or evading one, you won't succeed if you can't move quickly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3005 0 0}I'm sure you're tired of hearing this, but make sure you're fully prepared before going to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}You never know what'll happen there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}There are some aspects to battle that we simply can't manage with an unprepared leader.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3028 0 0}I'm sure you don't want to put everyone else in danger, so keep that in mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}Well, it's just about Golden Week...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I was looking forward to improving on past years' Golden Week training regimen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I guess that won't be happening this year...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3001 0 0}Maybe taking a day to do nothing once in a while isn't so bad.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If nothing else, I've learned some new ways to kill time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}That said, this is just one day. I don't know about spending multiple days in a row like this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}I feel like I'm doing all right enough at this point that I can at least do some light exercise.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}But as long as Mitsuru's watching me, I can't even do a single squat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}She hardly even trusts me to go to the restroom without trying to sneak in some training.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3074 0 0}If you're looking for Mitsuru, she's in the command room, training her detection skills.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But she says you can still let her know if you want to head to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3001 0 0}I get the urge to do some boxing practice whenever I'm at school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe I should just get back to it when I feel like I've gotten better? What do you think, {f 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3057 0 0}I was joking, I was joking! Don't give me that face.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}And anyway, even if you approved of it, there's no way Mitsuru would, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3131 0 0}Oh, you think so? Well, I was just joking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If I did something like that, there's no way Mitsuru would keep a lid on it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3095 0 0}You probably think I'm making a big deal out of nothing, but this downtime is driving me nuts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Seriously, why do bones take so long to heal...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}As Mitsuru says, this quiet is certainly odd.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I have a feeling something big is on its way... {f 4 1}, get as ready as you can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3078 0 0}Oh yeah, Junpei was whining about weapons being so expensive earlier...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But if you've got something you don't use, Kurosawa-san might buy it off you, if you ask.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, it's not like he buys everything, but if you're low on cash, you should hit him up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3141 0 0}Well done yesterday. Also... sorry.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}If I had gone, you never would've been exposed to such danger, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's frustrating, but there's nothing I can do now but bear it. I'll definitely be back within the month, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3028 0 0}It's fine to take a breather every so often, but don't forget about Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Although, it won't be too late if you wait until after I return. I'll leave that up to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}I don't mind if you go without me, but I'd definitely appreciate the opportunity to show my stuff.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3025 0 0}Whatever the battle, it's always important to face it with a level head.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, there are also opponents who'll try to play mind games with you...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Shadows may look mindless at times, but you absolutely can't take them lightly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}Hey, not that you were thinking of pulling one or anything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But all-nighters are completely pointless.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whether it's training or studying, daily practice is what really provides results.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}That Junpei... Will he be all right come exam time?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Every time I'm in here during a study break, he's here too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But, I don't think he ever leaves... That's quite a break he's taking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3074 0 0}It's a bummer how Yamagishi can't join us in fights, but don't worry, I'll be back in no time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Or... did you want to team up with her instead of me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3047 0 0}Really? Because Junpei was pretty down when he heard she wouldn't be going with us...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3057 0 0}You don't have to answer that... Are you really that worried about how I'd respond, though?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3131 0 0}Haha! Honest, aren't you? Although, the situation isn't changing any, so you might as well give up that hope.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}To really get my feel for battle back, a trip or two to Tartarus won't cut it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I feel like I'm gonna want to go every day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, if you're going tonight, give me a shout. I'm raring to go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3085 0 0}My scores on this latest round of exams were quite a bit higher than usual.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess it's only natural, considering how I used my training time to study instead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, right—Mitsuru told me she'll be back late tonight...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3054 0 0}So, according to her, Tartarus is a no-go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Kurosawa-san deals in a variety of weapons for us...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But my weapons? I've always got 'em on me, heh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}I dive right into the fray and dish out the pain... These might not be as flashy as some of your weapons, but they're my pride and joy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3062 0 0}Just tell me if you ever wanna fight with your fists too—I'll whip up a solid training regimen for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3096 0 0}In my eyes, Tartarus is the best place we can find for training the mind and body.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Although I do understand Mitsuru's concerns about the place... Is there even a top floor to that thing?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If so, what's at the top...? Oof, just thinking about it gives me the shivers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}Our efforts probably won't be appreciated by the people in town...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But if we don't fight, then the city'll eventually be overrun with the Lost.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's why we need to enjoy the peace and quiet whenever we find it—that's the result of our hard work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3074 0 0}Make sure you don't forget that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3009 0 0}...Even so, the Lost are more prevalent than ever right now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}They may go away for a bit after we beat a Shadow, but that sure doesn't last long.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess we really have to clean house in Tartarus to take care of the issue for good, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3116 0 0}Well, running our mouths about it won't do us any good. For now, all I can do is train properly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3074 0 0}Apparently, Tartarus is off-limits today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Mitsuru's in training, and Takeba "has a bad feeling" right now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sheesh... Could she be any more mysterious about it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}If you're looking for Mitsuru, she's in the back of the reception area.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Apparently, she's uploading the dorm's records or something to the school server. She's gotta do it every so often.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know it's her job, but still... She's really got a lot on her plate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, it's good to be that invested in things.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you're free, how about lending her a hand?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whatever the reality is, this definitely sounds like it'll be interesting.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm looking forward to the results.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}The level of gossip at school is getting pretty out of hand...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Today, there were three girls going on and on about a certain rumor...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}I really hope this gets taken care of sooner rather than later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Don't you get tired of these rumors?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3113 0 0}Yeah, that's what I thought. Well, good luck with your research.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3106 0 0}Ooh, aren't you the tough one? Well, good luck anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3106 0 0}Where there's smoke, there's fire... I'm interested in finding out the truth too. Good luck there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3136 0 0}What are you planning this time? Don't do anything too crazy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3122 0 0}Seriously—going to a place like that, there are limits to how reckless you can be.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, I'm proud of you guys for trying to gather information, but be a little more careful next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3136 0 0}Hm? What is it? If you're looking for Mitsuru and Takeba, they're on the third floor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It sounds like they're getting Yamagishi's room ready, so I doubt we'd be of much use.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Unless, like... they find a cockroach or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}Originally, Yamagishi was supposed to move in on Sunday...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But the plans got pushed forward at her request.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm glad she's so motivated. I'd better make sure I'm at the top of my game.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}An enemy that only appears on a full moon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe I should reorganize my training regimen while I still have the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}I'm sure you're already feeling it, but the enemies are steadily growing more powerful.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Don't be satisfied with how you are now—work on improving your strength. If you wait until after a tough battle, it'll be too late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}I'm sure you're already feeling it, but the enemies are steadily growing more powerful.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Don't be satisfied with how you are now—work on improving your strength. If you wait until after a tough battle, it'll be too late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3009 0 0}No matter the battle, a proper balance is key to winning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Not just power—mental strength, agility, and some luck, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's not easy to train up each aspect, but if you keep experiencing what life has to offer, you'll get the training along the way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}It really does seem like the Shadows are progressively getting stronger...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Although, that's not something to be too concerned about.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If we put in enough effort, we'll win. If we don't, then we lose. Pretty simple stuff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3116 0 0}That means there's nothing for us to do right now but keep climbing Tartarus and building up our strength.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do you just have no regrets or something?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Ah, sorry. I was just curious—I didn't mean anything by it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}Stories about the Lost have really picked up at school...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}My guess is that there's a Shadow making its move out there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}I guess our full moon theory was right. Hm, things are getting even more interesting...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3013 0 0}I know Mitsuru said it already, but it'll be a full moon in just a week.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Once you think about our timeframe, the tension really starts rising, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3005 0 0}Our next battle may be drawing near, but don't get too nervous.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you do, you might find yourself freezing up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Try and stay as relaxed as you can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Heh, things are about to get exciting... I can't wait to see what we're taking on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}Two days left... Don't slack on your training until the last minute, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know people sometimes feel like they've hit their limit...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But for most people, that's just an excuse. In reality, they've just given up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3025 0 0}No matter how much you're suffering, pushing through it is the only path to real progress.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_069_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3009 0 0}Mitsuru's not here, so we're skipping Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just take it easy for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3028 0 0}You're really making a name for yourself as our leader.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Especially with this latest operation—excellent commanding there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Next time, the enemies will probably get stronger again, but if you keep up the effort, I know you'll do fine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3096 0 0}I gotta say, I didn't expect Ikutsuki-san to come bearing good news.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I figured he was here just to share more of his lame jokes...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_072_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14227 0 0}Hahaha... Well, this isn't the time for that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}I am happy to see everyone with smiles on their faces, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3065 0 0}A lot of people are joining the team, huh...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Big difference from a while back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3066 0 0}So, it's finally summer vacation...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I have to change up my training when these longer vacations pop up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Care to join in? It'd make the summer extra worthwhile...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3094 0 0}Just one little kid, stuck living with a bunch of high schoolers... Well, I suppose it's not the worst thing to happen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 1}, try to make an effort being nice to the kid.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3036 0 0}I'm not saying it's bad or anything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But when you've got a little kid staring at you, it can be kinda awkward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3107 0 0}Koromaru... That is one tough customer, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}He protected what he needed to...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}What a good little guy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3066 0 0}Since it's the day before the competition, don't go overdoing any last-minute training.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}You could end up matched with that Hayase guy...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}Give your body some time to relax today so you can face the challenge in your best condition.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3141 0 0}Placing in the top rank of a team that you just started in... Well done.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Wish we could go take on some full moon Shadows while you're still in the zone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3094 0 0}Junpei is in quite high spirits, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe he just doesn't want to lose to Koromaru... Well, I certainly understand that feeling.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't like the idea of some dog swooping in and hogging all our glory.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3115 0 0}If you're heading to Tartarus, I'll join you. I wanna go wild tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3095 0 0}Training during this season is really exhausting...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'd like to wring a bit more range of movement out of my body, but maybe I should stop and rethink my pacing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}After all, the Shadows are getting tougher.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_084_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}The Shadows are getting tougher, no matter what we do. There's no time to rest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_085_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}I get the sense that there's quite a bit going on behind the scenes, but... the idea is simple enough.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Their goal and ours have crossed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But the next time they get in our way, we'll take them down. That's all there is to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3009 0 0}Sports and school work the same.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}No matter how strong you are, those who don't put in the effort fail.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's the same with school. If you don't study, you won't pass your tests.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_087_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3113 0 0}Oh right, today was the summer festival.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Me and Mitsuru, we're not really good at that sort of stuff...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But if you're interested, don't worry about us—go have a good time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3001 0 0}Apparently, Tartarus is a no-go today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Aigis dragged Mitsuru to the summer festival...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}Man, Aigis's restraint technique is amazing. Now there's an anti-Shadow weapon for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3131 0 0}Although, I did just realize, she's probably in a lot of trouble for that, too. I wonder what they're up to right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_089_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3074 0 0}Speaking of Koromaru's meals—sometimes, he looks like he wants to eat a beef bowl...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I guess it'd be better to just give him dog food.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know there are some foods that are dangerous to dogs, and it's not like he needs the stuff for his diet, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_090_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've never seen that guy do any homework... Is he gonna be all right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_091_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Even outside of training, this is a temperature where if you don't make sure you hydrate, you'll collapse...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3009 0 0}It sounds like we're able to go to Tartarus tonight...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But Mitsuru says she's going to pass. Some kinda business she has to take care of, I guess.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_092_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3136 0 0}That Junpei, talking nonsense again...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Did the heat finally finish off his final brain cells? Eh, I guess I'll just leave him alone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_093_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3106 0 0}It's finally the end of August.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Once school starts back up again, you won't have much time for anything else.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you have anything you need to do, you'd better take care of it now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_093_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3025 0 0}Just because it's hot out doesn't make it a reason to skip training.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, for Tartarus—if you're going to go, give me a shout, all right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3107 0 0}If you ask me, it's just like Ikutsuki-san said—Amada has a strong will.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Even if he's just a kid, I guess his determination is the real deal...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_095_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Would you mind looking after him? For me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_098_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}I'm not very good at that kinda stuff...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_098_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3001 0 0}I'll leave Amada to you. I think you'll handle things with him well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_099_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3080 0 0}I had nothing to do with this, all right? It was all Mitsuru.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If anything happens at school, I'm not gonna be held responsible for it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3122 0 0}*sigh* What is Ikutsuki-san thinking?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_100_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3094 0 0}At this point, there's nothing left to say about the group's fighting strength...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}But yours hasn't dulled, right? Heh, I'm already excited for the next full moon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_102_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}The full moon's close. Make sure you've got our plan of attack hammered out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you're not set yet, you should rely on Shinji for the time being.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}He's got a pretty strong arm, this guy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_103_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9083 0 0}Huh? Ah, don't listen to him. I'm nothing special.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_103_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3001 0 0}Well, tomorrow probably won't be an easy fight...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But that's fine. I prefer when they make me sweat a bit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_104_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3009 0 0}We probably won't be going to the hospital again, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It seems like that Chidori person wasn't all that compatible with us...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Except for one person.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_105_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3074 0 0}Tell me, what do you personally think of Shinji?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know how he can come across, but he's not a bad guy. Yeah, he can be a nag, but still...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, feel free to put him to work on the team.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_105_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3085 0 0}We've got three Shadows remaining, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Phew... Just thinking that makes my body tense up. Maybe I'll beef up my training a bit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_107_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3068 0 0}Now we've got a typhoon headed our way...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Still not sure if it's going to lay us out or not, though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_108_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}This building was damaged by that Shadow back in April.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I wonder if there are any leaks...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I hope this place didn't get damaged as badly as I did, heh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_109_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3013 0 0}Is your body totally healed up?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}The physical health of a fighter is very important... Be careful.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}No matter how strong you are, if you don't feel well, you won't last long in the ring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_110_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3025 0 0}Mitsuru is saying all that, but we only have three Shadows left.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Once we defeat them, there won't be any more news about the Lost...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}We just have to give our best for a bit longer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_111_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Welp, that time's coming around once again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}After a few more full moons, we'll have eliminated them all... It's almost disappointing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_111_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}There's still a bit of time until Sunday.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I won't lecture you on how to spend your time anymore. I'm sure you've got your own approach at this point.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_113_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}I wonder how many Shadows there'll be this time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}At most, I think there'll be two...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But, if it's two powerful ones, it's going to be a tough fight...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3115 0 0}How about we spend our last bit of time before that on some strength training?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_114_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3122 0 0}*sigh* Nothing lasts forever, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Shinji was satisfied. He got out while he was ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let him rest in peace. We should be focusing on what we need to do now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's less than a week until midterms...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_115_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}You've got the face of someone who can't focus on their schoolwork right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I definitely know how you feel...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But still, make sure you do what you've got to do. I mean, if he saw how you're acting, he'd get upset.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3025 0 0}For now, just focus on your studies. All right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_115_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3085 0 0}One more Shadow left... A lot's happened, but the next one is the last.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}We've finally made it. For us, there's nothing left except winning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Try to keep it together, all right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_116_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3136 0 0}Every time I come in here, Junpei's here too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}He'll always tell me, "I'm takin' a break too" or something, but... how much rest does the guy need?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, for it to be called a break, you have to actually do something else to take a break from it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_117_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2133 0 0}Uh... We just happened to be taking our breaks at the same time, Sanada-san![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_118_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3010 0 0}Now that we're done with exams, I can finally put all my focus on training.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}First, I need to increase my weekly workouts...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If I don't keep pushing myself, I just won't feel like I'm being as useful as possible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_119_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3001 0 0}Is the machine in the command room still acting up?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_120_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4029 0 0}Yes, it hasn't been repaired yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_121_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}So we don't know the cause? Then, how'll we ever fix it...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_122_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}I'll check it out later. If you have time for it, could you check it too, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_123_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}How were your results for the exams? Mine were the usual.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, we can't be wasting time worrying about exam results right now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}Our priority should be to train as much as we can for the final battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_124_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3010 0 0}I made some changes to my training regimen recently...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'd heard that imagining someone watching your back while you work out is supposed to be effective.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}I had my doubts at first, but turns out, it works pretty well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_125_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3001 0 0}This theory applies to sports tournaments as well...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}When a person is made aware that the next match will be their last one, there are two types of responses.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}One: they get nervous and stiffen up, preventing them from displaying their true capabilities. Two: they get even more fired up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3080 0 0}Needless to say, I'm the second type. Sometimes I even get fired up while I'm just training.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, my point is, the more you train, the more you'll clearly recognize when victory is within your grasp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_127_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}We don't have many opportunities left to go to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It'd make sense if I beefed up my own training so I could take full advantage of each Tartarus visit...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}All right, I'm going to start planning it out now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_128_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}Mitsuru says we'll probably come across Strega in the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Personally, I hope we do...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've got some payback to deliver.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_129_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}Mitsuru says we'll probably come across Strega in the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Personally, I hope we do...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm gonna wreck them for what they did to Shinji.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_130_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3076 0 0}As you already know, Mitsuru's a very strong person...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}But this is just too huge...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_131_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3074 0 0}Mitsuru will be gone a little bit longer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}There's so much she has to deal with on her own now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}I wish there was more I could do for her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_133_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3027 0 0}Mitsuru's back, but like anyone would expect...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sure there's nothing we can say to actually make her feel better.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}All we can do is let time heal her wounds.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_134_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3010 0 0}So, we're back on track for Tartarus again, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know she'd prefer we weren't so considerate towards her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}But still, look out for her, will ya?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_135_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3091 0 0}Mitsuru's still not 100% yet, and I don't know what we should be doing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}Dammit... How long is this situation gonna last?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_136_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}Mitsuru finally decided to go on the school trip too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I was really worried she wouldn't, so that's one piece of good news.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_137_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3121 0 0}You guys need to grow up more. If we'd gotten caught...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}We would've experienced hell on earth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_138_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3033 0 0}I'll just say this: the main offenders were Junpei and Mochizuki.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}We were forced to do it against our will! We're victims too here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3112 0 0}Could you just leave me alone now...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_139_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, too bad... That's what a job's like.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's fine to complain, but just make sure you finish what you're supposed to do, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_140_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sure he knows what he has to do...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_141_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}He's just afraid to do it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}He just needs something to push him into taking that first step...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_143_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's good to see the classic Junpei in action again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_144_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3068 0 0}Mochizuki asked Mitsuru out...? Heh, I'm surprised he's still alive.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I used to think he was all talk. I guess he's got guts of his own...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_145_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}This can't be happening! I won't accept it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_146_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If we panic, we won't be able to make the right choice. First, we should go over all the information we have...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_148_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}And their sole reason of existence is to revive her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_149_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3063 0 0}The Appriser is the one who summons Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}The appearance of the Appriser is a sign that the Fall is near...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}And all humans will become members of the Lost.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3049 0 0}...I guess everything that's happening right now is just the beginning.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_150_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3076 0 0}According to Mochizuki, it was Nyx who brought the concept of death to this planet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Nyx will turn every human being into a member of the Lost...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}And because the Lost cannot survive without someone taking care of them, everyone will die.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_151_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3080 0 0}Thinking about it isn't going to change anything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}So I'm going to train.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's all I can do at this point.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_152_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}Dammit... What can we do?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_153_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3011 0 0}You make a schedule so you can achieve a goal...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But without a future... a training schedule is pointless.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}Dammit! I don't know what to do...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_154_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}What would he do at a time like this...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}He'd probably fight the end of the world with all he had...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_155_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3029 0 0}Yeah, she said we should just act like everything is normal...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But that probably refers to keeping our emotions in check. It doesn't mean you don't have to study for exams if you normally don't.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}You'll be fine though, won't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_158_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3031 0 0}I understand how you feel, but just try to focus on what's right in front of you for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_159_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3130 0 0}Oh, I'm good to go. I've gotten in the habit of studying every day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_160_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}It's about time for the Christmas mood to start setting in...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's try to have some fun, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}After all, we don't know if we'll live to see next Christmas...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_161_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3013 0 0}I wonder what Mochizuki is doing right now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe he's cursing fate. Why does he even care about life on earth?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_162_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}I don't really wanna think about it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}No matter what we do, we can't stop it from happening.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_164_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3124 0 0}I wish I could just forget about it, too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But the Promised Day will eventually come—there's no escaping it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_165_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3027 0 0}Oh, I was just thinking about something...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now that our exams are done, I can't stop thinking about the decision we have to make.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}This is even harder than studying for exams...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_166_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3049 0 0}Oh, there's no school tomorrow, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm not really doing anything. What about you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_168_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, we don't get many days off, so spend them wisely.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_169_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3094 0 0}Is that right? It's nice to just relax once in a while, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, make sure you spend the time wisely.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_169_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3094 0 0}It's totally up to you how to spend your time. Just try to make it worthwhile.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_170_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}That the moment you meet eyes with your opponent, the fight's begun?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}And the first one to look away loses.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3062 0 0}That's why I'm not going to look away anymore. I'm going to stare right into Nyx's eyes...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_171_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}It's going to be winter vacation soon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Have you decided what you're going to tell him yet?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Wait, don't tell me now. I want to hear it when the day comes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_172_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3009 0 0}It's finally winter vacation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I wonder what we'll be doing once it's over...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whatever it is, I hope we won't regret it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_173_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It kinda feels like when I'm stepping into the ring before a match...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_174_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3141 0 0}Heh, looks like we're gonna be facing Nyx head on...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, I say bring it. I'm going to give this everything I've got.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_175_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's good to be starting a new year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_176_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Who would buy that line?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_177_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3013 0 0}"Mysterious cases"... That's all they're talking about on the news.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Up until now, the reports on Shadow incidents had been altered before being publicized, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_177_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}Yes, that goes the same for the victims. The public receives a watered-down version of the truth.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If a person is found unconscious, it's framed as a mugging. If a person goes missing, it's reported as a kidnapping. That's how they've been handled.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, the problem is that these incidents are sporadic, and the culprits are never identified...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}In the end, they're classified as mysterious cases because everything about them is unexplainable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_177_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3113 0 0}Hmm... So it's the sheer number of cases that's arousing suspicion...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Things are getting pretty serious...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_178_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3001 0 0}Everyone at school thinks this is just a normal third term.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}They have no clue that this may be their last third term ever.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't know how to feel...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}Even though we're in the same classroom, it feels like we're living in different worlds...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_180_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3080 0 0}Even if I wasn't in SEES, I still wouldn't join the cult.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}How about you? Do you think you'd ever fall down that rabbit hole?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_182_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3130 0 0}Heh, that's what I thought you'd say.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}The cult can't influence those who are true to themselves.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Boxing helped me find my true self, and it seems like you have your own activities to keep you focused.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_183_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3062 0 0}Hmm. Sounds like you might need to do some introspection. Can't give the cult any chance to root itself in you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Boxing helped me to face myself. Maybe you could find an activity to help you find your true self, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_183_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3130 0 0}Facing yourself and having strong values will help free you from a cult's deceptions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I wish those who have been deceived could do that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_184_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3001 0 0}Studying for the college entrance exams got me thinking about where my life's going.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}We've all got our futures ahead of us, and we're not going to let Nyx stand in our way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_185_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}For me and Shinji, our goal was to find a way to rid the world of the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}And now, he's passed the torch on to us to fulfill that goal...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm gonna put an end to this, whatever it takes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_187_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2118 0 0}Don't you worry, Sanada-san! We're gonna kick Nyx's ass![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_189_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3028 0 0}Oh yeah? Then I'll hold you to your word.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_190_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3025 0 0}I've been thinking that we should start incorporating more nutritious meals into Koromaru's eating regimen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}How about horse meat? I hear it helps relieve fatigue, and it's high in protein.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_192_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}He's gonna need his strength for the battle ahead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_193_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3047 0 0}You think? He's gonna need all the energy he can get.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Dogs don't have the luxury of choosing what they eat. We should at least provide him with something tasty.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}And, considering the circumstances, I don't think it'd be asking too much to splurge on a nice meal for him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_194_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3009 0 0}Now Junpei's got all the more reason to give it his all. No way he'll let us lose.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_195_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3012 0 0}Your career consultation is next week, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've got no advice for you. This is something you're gonna have to figure out on your own.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you let someone else tell you what to do with your life, you might end up resenting that person if things go south.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_195_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}All things considered, this bears repeating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 0 1 2}Once we enter Tartarus on the 31st, there's no going back.{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3062 0 0}Spend this time wisely. Can't leap into the unknown with unfinished business, now, can we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_197_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3013 0 0}The future is like train tracks...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}And defeating Nyx may be our next stop, but it's not our ultimate destination.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's up to us to figure out what that'll be.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_198_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}You've probably had this thought already, but after all this is over, SEES won't be needed anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's hard to wrap my head around it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess it's too soon to get emotional over it. Better to spend that energy focusing on defeating Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3062 0 0}Well, why don't we go to Tartarus and train? Can't be too prepared.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0131_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}A fighter needs their energy if they're gonna go all out in battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}And it doesn't hurt to share a meal that's so full of precious memories...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Well, eat up! Don't want you going into tonight's battle on an empty stomach.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_199_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3009 0 0}Here we are. It all ends tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}Don't look so worried. We're going to win.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3025 0 0}And Shinji will be fighting alongside us tonight... I can feel it.[n]{f 1 1}
